counters.description: this matchup, it can be extreme or major depending on her comp and yours. if she has vi or nocturne, it's very easy to die after lvl 6 onwards. if you have vi, you can easily lock her down with your cage. if the ahri is good she is gonna push from lvl 1, so you have to try to match her wave clear.

you can't do much against this champion early game, if he is good, you can't walk to the lane lvl 1, since he can start e and poke you down. you can somewhat outscale him, if your team responds to his roams, and he doesn't snowball. his revive passive is really op, be careful of that, try to focus him in teamfights, when u can.
terrible matchup for veigar, it used to be in favor of him or even, now it's a lot harder ever since the item changes. i usually go unsealed spellbook into shurelia into e max
very hard matchup. i recommend the veigar vs mobile/etc build.
hard matchup. i recommend the veigar vs mobile/etc build.

kassadin threat is either even or major(extreme), because i go ad veigar into him to bully him early game, then swap to ap with roa rabadon. you have to keep track of enemy jg by warding at 1:20, his jungle camps. if you get ganked and die, it can easily become extreme threat as thats what kassadin needs in ad veigar matchup...

depending on how he plays it can either be extreme or even matchup, you need help at lvl 5-6 against him, so ping for ur jungler or support and hope that with them u can take his flash down with ur cage.
you need bone plating in this matchup, because if he has hail of blades, he can take half of ur hp lvl 1 with e start.
if u don't have team listening to ur pings, and they run it down, just ff and go next.
at level 6, use your ultimate to trade, don't keep it, as her ultimate is low cooldown, you don't have much of a choice, so it's better to make her half health.
boots of swiftness might help, in any case this matchup is rly hard after 6.

synergies.description: it can be ideal, to none if he misses his hook.
s++, one of the best synergy with veigar's cage, as she can use her e to put enemy into veigar's e stun.
kaisa has both ad ap combined, so when you have this champ on your team, make sure your comp is either you and her as ap, or 3 ap comp max. otherwise enemy team can easily stack mr.
it's strong when you have an engage with kindred. for example, leona nautilus etc.
the only issue, veigar with leona in the mid game, is enemy stacking mercury treads, other than that it's ok combo, whether on mid or apc.
it's either low or ideal, depending on if the bard player is good at his champion.

alistar has the best synergy for veigar mid/apc especially on apc, because of his passive that can help you survive the laning phase much easier, and of his setup. be careful though, veigar and alistar are weak early levels especially level 1, play passive and scale up.
kogmaw ap support with veigar apc, is actually quite decent, if u want to wombo combo with poke synergy, then this is it, against enemy enchanters usually, for example like soraka/nami etc.
it's ok, as long as u don't face pyke/nautilus/etc, every engage often, and both of you can scale.
it can be ideal, to none if he misses his hook.
